_comment: ADK reads this at deploy time and merges it into the Vertex AI agent_engines.create() call. `service_account` makes the deployed Reasoning Engine run as Nick's own per-agent SA (not the Forum project's default compute SA), so Google Doc / Drive / Workspace calls authenticate as that SA — sharing a doc with this SA grants access to Nick only. The cross-project IAM that lets the Forum project run the engine as this SA is provisioned in terraform/main.tf (google_service_account_iam_member.engine_token_creator). Field shape: https://cloud.google.com/vertex-ai/generative-ai/docs/agent-engine
